mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(CI.COMPANY_NUMBER) FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER
WHERE C.COMPANY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{_parameter} || '%'

SELECT C.COMPANY_NUMBER, C.COMPANY_NAME, C.COMPANY_ADDRESS, C.COMPANY_STATE, C.COMPANY_BRN, F.FILE_PATH, CI.COMP_CEO_NAME, CI.COMP_FND_YEAR, CI.COMP_EMPL_CNT, CI.COMP_REV, CI.COMP_CAP, CI.COMP_TYPE, CI.COMP_SUMMARY, CI.COMP_TECH, CI.COMP_MAIN_BIZ, CI.COMP_INFO, CI.COMP_SVC_HIST, JP.JOB_POST_PROFILE, JP.JOB_POST_CONTENT, JP.JOB_POST_PROCESS, JP.JOB_POST_METHOD, TO_CHAR(JP.JOB_POST_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS JOB_POST_DATE, NVL(JP.CAT1_IS_HIRING, 0) AS CAT1_IS_HIRING, NVL(JP.CAT2_IS_HIRING, 0) AS CAT2_IS_HIRING, NVL(JP.CAT3_IS_HIRING, 0) AS CAT3_IS_HIRING, NVL(JP.CAT4_IS_HIRING, 0) AS CAT4_IS_HIRING FROM TBL_COMPANY C JOIN TBL_COMP_INFO CI ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = CI.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_FILE F ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = F.COMPANY_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_JOB_POST JP ON C.COMPANY_NUMBER = JP.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE C.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{value}
